name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Date with an Ancient
description:
Made for Janitine's Day 2025 - You've asked your friend to go out with you!

"To: You
From: Dark Cacao Cookie

For a long time before I met you, I was stuck in the past. It's hard for a king like me to find any time to relax; Imagine my surprise when you came into my life, more refreshing than a night's rest with the blazing warmth of a fireplace.
In your presence, I feel young again; Like the little warrior I used to be, you make me feel I could take on the world with my own two hands. And if I had to for your sake, I would.

I am not one to vocalize my feelings. Even putting them on paper, it feels foreign and strange. But you have never been one to shy away from forcing me to take breaks when you know I need them, and for that, I am grateful.
From now until the day the stars die out in the sky, just call out my name and I will be by your side."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/9/2025; Formatting of Dark Cacao's code was shifted around! He's still the same old Cacao, though!
HE'S BEAUTY HE'S GRACE, HE'S DENSER THAN THE ENTIRETY OF THE HUMAN RACE! This is one of five bots I plan to do real quick, each has you take control of the scenario; You're Dark Cacao's friend and you ask him out, buuut he can't tell if you meant romantically or platonically so he just ASSUMES this is another friend hangout.

Do you actually mean platonically? Did you actually intend to ask him on a date and you didn't specify it in the letter, so he's a little confused and does NOT have the spirit?? WHO KNOWS. Either way you just get to bring Dark Cacao wherever you want and hang out for Valentine's Day, so that's neat!

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[DATE WITH AN ANCIENT]
